## Immigration Attorneys & Counselors Since 1975

## we stand by your side through every challenge

## Chicago immigration Attorneys
Minsky, McCormick & Hallagan, P.C. brings decades of experience to the practice of U.S. immigration and citizenship law. From our offices in Chicago, Illinois, we have been helping immigrants since 1975 and pride ourselves on being leading U.S. immigration lawyers. Whether you are an individual pursuing the American dream, a family seeking to be reunited, or a business leveraging a global workforce, ensuring they have access to the best talent from around the world, we are capable of providing answers to your toughest immigration questions.
Senior Litigation Attorney

### Dedicated Chicago immigration Attorneys
Our firm has set the benchmark in immigration law since its inception under our founding partner, Joseph Minsky. An early advocate for civil rights, he eventually channeled that commitment into immigration law, gaining national acclaim as an expert in the field.
We continue to build upon that reputation. We offer high-quality legal services and advise clients in  all areas of immigration law, including citizenship, permanent residency, temporary work visas, asylum and humanitarian relief, removal defense, and employer compliance.
Our immigration lawyers in Chicago are ready to help you with your immigration needs.

## call to schedule a consultation we are ready to help

## WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT?
We’ve championed thousands of cases, navigating diverse court challenges.

#### Skillful & Committed
Our legacy is marked by victories even when handling the most challenging immigration challenges.

#### Top-Tier Client Feedback
Continuous 5-star ratings highlight our efficient and effective approach.

#### Transparent Communication
Every client question or communication is addressed, ensuring they’re always informed and confident.
